LightningComponentBundle.description: Preview table that updates in real-time via Lightning Message Service

property.name: hideDiscountColumn
property.label: Hide Discount Column
property.description: Hide the Discount% column from the preview table

property.name: hideUpliftColumn
property.label: Hide Uplift Column
property.description: Hide the Uplift% column from the preview table

property.name: defaultScheduleName
property.label: Default Schedule Name
property.description: Initial schedule name so preview matches form (e.g. 4 Year Ramp Schedule)

property.name: defaultDuration
property.label: Default Duration (Months)
property.description: Initial duration in months so preview matches form

property.name: defaultTrialDiscount
property.label: Default Trial Discount (%)
property.description: Initial trial discount so preview matches form

property.name: defaultTrialDuration
property.label: Default Trial Duration (Days)
property.description: Initial trial duration in days so preview matches form

property.name: defaultStartDate
property.label: Default Start Date (YYYY-MM-DD)
property.description: Initial start date so preview matches form

property.name: validationStatus
property.label: Validation Status
property.description: Output property indicating if segments are valid

property.name: segmentsJson
property.label: Segments JSON
property.description: JSON string of segments for API

property.name: scheduleNameOutput
property.label: Schedule Name
property.description: The schedule name entered by user
